# Bug Detection & Fixes for `/src/app/login/page.tsx`

I've reviewed your login page and identified several critical security, UX, and functionality issues:

## Issues Found:

1. **No rate limiting** – Users can brute force passwords
2. **No CSRF protection** – Vulnerable to cross-site requests
3. **Hardcoded colors** – Should use design system (green instead of primary)
4. **No email verification flow** – Unclear email verification process
5. **No "Remember Me"** – Users must login every time
6. **No social login** – Missing OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, etc.)
7. **No account lockout** – After failed attempts, no protection
8. **Generic error messages** – Leaks information about accounts
9. **No password hints** – Doesn't guide users on password requirements
10. **No loading skeleton** – Page layout shifts during load
11. **No accessibility attributes** – Missing aria-live, roles
12. **Form not disabled on success** – Could submit twice
13. **No dark mode support** – Hardcoded light colors
14. **Email not normalized** – Could cause issues with case-sensitive DBs
15. **No error recovery** – Users stuck if login fails
16. **Success message timing** – Doesn't auto-clear
17. **No session timeout message** – Users don't know why they're logged out
18. **Search params not sanitized** – XSS vulnerability
19. **No redirect validation** – Could redirect to malicious URLs
20. **No two-factor authentication** – Weak security for sensitive accounts

---

## Enhanced Fixed Version:

````typescript
// filepath: c:\Users\SIR AIM\Desktop\IYOSIOLA GROUP WEB APP\iyisola-foods\src\app\login\page.tsx

"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef, Suspense } from "react";
import { signIn } from "next-auth/react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";
import { z } from "zod";

// ✅ Validation schema
const LoginSchema = z.object({
  email: z
    .string()
    .email("Invalid email address")
    .max(100, "Email must be less than 100 characters")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase(),
  password: z
    .string()
    .min(1, "Password is required")
    .max(128, "Password is invalid"),
});

// ✅ Type definitions
interface LoginResponse {
  ok: boolean;
  error?: string;
  status: number;
}

interface FormData {
  email: string;
  password: string;
}

// ✅ Safe redirect validation
function isValidRedirect(redirect: string | null): boolean {
  if (!redirect) return false;

  // Only allow relative URLs starting with /
  if (!redirect.startsWith("/")) return false;

  // Prevent common open redirect patterns
  const dangerous = ["//", "http://", "https://", "javascript:", "data:"];
  if (dangerous.some((pattern) => redirect.includes(pattern))) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

// ✅ Loading skeleton
function LoginSkeleton() {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 animate-pulse">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="h-8 bg-surface-200 rounded w-3/4 mx-auto" />
        <div className="h-4 bg-surface-200 rounded w-1/2 mx-auto" />
      </div>
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
        <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
      </div>
      <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
    </div>
  );
}

// ✅ Login form component
function LoginForm() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();

  // ✅ State management
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<FormData>({
    email: "",
    password: "",
  });
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [successMsg, setSuccessMsg] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [rememberMe, setRememberMe] = useState(false);
  const [sessionExpired, setSessionExpired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorRequired, setTwoFactorRequired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorCode, setTwoFactorCode] = useState("");

  const submitTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();
  const successTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();

  // ✅ Check for session expiry or redirect params on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const sessionExpired = searchParams.get("session_expired");
    const registered = searchParams.get("registered");
    const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");

    if (sessionExpired === "true") {
      setSessionExpired(true);
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue."
      );
    }

    if (registered === "true") {
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Account created successfully! Please check your email to verify your account before logging in."
      );
    }

    // Validate redirect URL
    if (redirectUrl && !isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)) {
      console.warn("[SECURITY] Invalid redirect URL attempted:", redirectUrl);
    }
  }, [searchParams]);

  // ✅ Handle form input change
  const handleInputChange = useCallback(
    (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      const { name, value } = e.target;

      setFormData((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        [name]: value,
      }));

      // Clear field error on change
      if (errors[name]) {
        setErrors((prev) => {
          const newErrors = { ...prev };
          delete newErrors[name];
          return newErrors;
        });
      }

      // Clear general error
      if (error) {
        setError(null);
      }
    },
    [errors, error]
  );

  // ✅ Validate form
  const validateForm = useCallback((): boolean => {
    setErrors({});

    const validation = LoginSchema.safeParse(formData);

    if (!validation.success) {
      const fieldErrors: Record<string, string> = {};
      validation.error.errors.forEach((err) => {
        fieldErrors[err.path.join(".")] = err.message;
      });
      setErrors(fieldErrors);
      return false;
    }

    return true;
  }, [formData]);

  // ✅ Handle login submission
  const handleSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      // ✅ Prevent double submission
      if (loading || submitTimeoutRef.current) return;

      // ✅ Validate form
      if (!validateForm()) {
        return;
      }

      setError(null);
      setLoading(true);

      try {
        // ✅ Submit to NextAuth
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          rememberMe: rememberMe,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          // ✅ Handle specific error cases
          if (res.error === "EmailNotVerified") {
            setError(
              "Please verify your email address first. Check your inbox for the verification link."
            );
            // Option to resend verification email
          } else if (res.error === "AccountLocked") {
            setError(
              "Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes or reset your password."
            );
          } else if (res.error === "TwoFactorRequired") {
            setTwoFactorRequired(true);
            setTwoFactorCode("");
            return;
          } else if (res.error === "InvalidCredentials") {
            setError("Invalid email or password. Please try again.");
          } else {
            setError(
              "Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials and try again."
            );
          }
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        // ✅ Successful login
        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl

        router.push(destination);

        setError(
          "An unexpected error occurred. Please check your connection and try again."
        );
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData, loading, validateForm, router, searchParams, rememberMe]
  );

  // ✅ Handle 2FA submission
  const handleTwoFactorSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      if (!twoFactorCode.trim()) {
        setError("Please enter your authentication code");
        return;
      }

      setLoading(true);

      try {
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          twoFactorCode: twoFactorCode,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          setError("Invalid authentication code. Please try again.");
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] 2FA submission failed:", err);
        setError("Failed to verify code. Please try again.");
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData.email, formData.password, twoFactorCode, router, searchParams]
  );

  // ✅ Cleanup timeouts on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (submitTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(submitTimeoutRef.current);
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  // ✅ Auto-clear success message
  useEffect(() => {
    if (successMsg && !sessionExpired) {
      successTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setSuccessMsg(null);
      }, 5000);
    }

    return () => {
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, [successMsg, sessionExpired]);

  // ✅ 2FA Form UI
  if (twoFactorRequired) {
    return (
      <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 bg-white dark:bg-surface-800 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-surface-200 dark:border-surface-700">
        <div className="text-center">

# Bug Detection & Fixes for `/src/app/login/page.tsx`

I've reviewed your login page and identified several critical security, UX, and functionality issues:

## Issues Found:

1. **No rate limiting** – Users can brute force passwords
2. **No CSRF protection** – Vulnerable to cross-site requests
3. **Hardcoded colors** – Should use design system (green instead of primary)
4. **No email verification flow** – Unclear email verification process
5. **No "Remember Me"** – Users must login every time
6. **No social login** – Missing OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, etc.)
7. **No account lockout** – After failed attempts, no protection
8. **Generic error messages** – Leaks information about accounts
9. **No password hints** – Doesn't guide users on password requirements
10. **No loading skeleton** – Page layout shifts during load
11. **No accessibility attributes** – Missing aria-live, roles
12. **Form not disabled on success** – Could submit twice
13. **No dark mode support** – Hardcoded light colors
14. **Email not normalized** – Could cause issues with case-sensitive DBs
15. **No error recovery** – Users stuck if login fails
16. **Success message timing** – Doesn't auto-clear
17. **No session timeout message** – Users don't know why they're logged out
18. **Search params not sanitized** – XSS vulnerability
19. **No redirect validation** – Could redirect to malicious URLs
20. **No two-factor authentication** – Weak security for sensitive accounts

---

    },
    [formData, loading, validateForm, router, searchParams, rememberMe]
  );

  // ✅ Handle 2FA submission
  const handleTwoFactorSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      if (!twoFactorCode.trim()) {
        setError("Please enter your authentication code");
        return;
      }

      setLoading(true);

      try {
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          twoFactorCode: twoFactorCode,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          setError("Invalid authentication code. Please try again.");
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] 2FA submission failed:", err);
        setError("Failed to verify code. Please try again.");
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData.email, formData.password, twoFactorCode, router, searchParams]
  );

  // ✅ Cleanup timeouts on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (submitTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(submitTimeoutRef.current);
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  // ✅ Auto-clear success message
  useEffect(() => {
    if (successMsg && !sessionExpired) {
      successTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setSuccessMsg(null);
      }, 5000);
    }

    return () => {
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, [successMsg, sessionExpired]);

  // ✅ 2FA Form UI
  if (twoFactorRequired) {
    return (
      <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 bg-white dark:bg-surface-800 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-surface-200 dark:border-surface-700">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
            <svg
              className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600"
              fill="none"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              stroke="currentColor"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M12 15v2m-6 4h12a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2zm10-

# Bug Detection & Fixes for `/src/app/login/page.tsx`

I've reviewed your login page and identified several critical security, UX, and functionality issues:

## Issues Found:

1. **No rate limiting** – Users can brute force passwords
2. **No CSRF protection** – Vulnerable to cross-site requests
3. **Hardcoded colors** – Should use design system (green instead of primary)
4. **No email verification flow** – Unclear email verification process
5. **No "Remember Me"** – Users must login every time
6. **No social login** – Missing OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, etc.)
7. **No account lockout** – After failed attempts, no protection
8. **Generic error messages** – Leaks information about accounts
9. **No password hints** – Doesn't guide users on password requirements
10. **No loading skeleton** – Page layout shifts during load
11. **No accessibility attributes** – Missing aria-live, roles
12. **Form not disabled on success** – Could submit twice
13. **No dark mode support** – Hardcoded light colors
14. **Email not normalized** – Could cause issues with case-sensitive DBs
15. **No error recovery** – Users stuck if login fails
16. **Success message timing** – Doesn't auto-clear
17. **No session timeout message** – Users don't know why they're logged out
18. **Search params not sanitized** – XSS vulnerability
19. **No redirect validation** – Could redirect to malicious URLs
20. **No two-factor authentication** – Weak security for sensitive accounts

---

## Enhanced Fixed Version:

````typescript
// filepath: c:\Users\SIR AIM\Desktop\IYOSIOLA GROUP WEB APP\iyisola-foods\src\app\login\page.tsx

"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef, Suspense } from "react";
import { signIn } from "next-auth/react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";
import { z } from "zod";

// ✅ Validation schema
const LoginSchema = z.object({
  email: z
    .string()
    .email("Invalid email address")
    .max(100, "Email must be less than 100 characters")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase(),
  password: z
    .string()
    .min(1, "Password is required")
    .max(128, "Password is invalid"),
});

// ✅ Type definitions
interface LoginResponse {
  ok: boolean;
  error?: string;
  status: number;
}

interface FormData {
  email: string;
  password: string;
}

// ✅ Safe redirect validation
function isValidRedirect(redirect: string | null): boolean {
  if (!redirect) return false;

  // Only allow relative URLs starting with /
  if (!redirect.startsWith("/")) return false;

  // Prevent common open redirect patterns
  const dangerous = ["//", "http://", "https://", "javascript:", "data:"];
  if (dangerous.some((pattern) => redirect.includes(pattern))) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

// ✅ Loading skeleton
function LoginSkeleton() {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 animate-pulse">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="h-8 bg-surface-200 rounded w-3/4 mx-auto" />
        <div className="h-4 bg-surface-200 rounded w-1/2 mx-auto" />
      </div>
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
        <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
      </div>
      <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
    </div>
  );
}

// ✅ Login form component
function LoginForm() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();

  // ✅ State management
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<FormData>({
    email: "",
    password: "",
  });
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [successMsg, setSuccessMsg] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [rememberMe, setRememberMe] = useState(false);
  const [sessionExpired, setSessionExpired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorRequired, setTwoFactorRequired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorCode, setTwoFactorCode] = useState("");

  const submitTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();
  const successTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();

  // ✅ Check for session expiry or redirect params on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const sessionExpired = searchParams.get("session_expired");
    const registered = searchParams.get("registered");
    const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");

    if (sessionExpired === "true") {
      setSessionExpired(true);
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue."
      );
    }

    if (registered === "true") {
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Account created successfully! Please check your email to verify your account before logging in."
      );
    }

    // Validate redirect URL
    if (redirectUrl && !isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)) {
      console.warn("[SECURITY] Invalid redirect URL attempted:", redirectUrl);
    }
  }, [searchParams]);

  // ✅ Handle form input change
  const handleInputChange = useCallback(
    (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      const { name, value } = e.target;

      setFormData((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        [name]: value,
      }));

      // Clear field error on change
      if (errors[name]) {
        setErrors((prev) => {
          const newErrors = { ...prev };
          delete newErrors[name];
          return newErrors;
        });
      }

      // Clear general error
      if (error) {
        setError(null);
      }
    },
    [errors, error]
  );

  // ✅ Validate form
  const validateForm = useCallback((): boolean => {
    setErrors({});

    const validation = LoginSchema.safeParse(formData);

    if (!validation.success) {
      const fieldErrors: Record<string, string> = {};
      validation.error.errors.forEach((err) => {
        fieldErrors[err.path.join(".")] = err.message;
      });
      setErrors(fieldErrors);
      return false;
    }

    return true;
  }, [formData]);

  // ✅ Handle login submission
  const handleSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      // ✅ Prevent double submission
      if (loading || submitTimeoutRef.current) return;

      // ✅ Validate form
      if (!validateForm()) {
        return;
      }

      setError(null);
      setLoading(true);

      try {
        // ✅ Submit to NextAuth
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          rememberMe: rememberMe,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          // ✅ Handle specific error cases
          if (res.error === "EmailNotVerified") {
            setError(
              "Please verify your email address first. Check your inbox for the verification link."
            );
            // Option to resend verification email
          } else if (res.error === "AccountLocked") {
            setError(
              "Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes or reset your password."
            );
          } else if (res.error === "TwoFactorRequired") {
            setTwoFactorRequired(true);
            setTwoFactorCode("");
            return;
          } else if (res.error === "InvalidCredentials") {
            setError("Invalid email or password. Please try again.");
          } else {
            setError(
              "Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials and try again."
            );
          }
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        // ✅ Successful login
        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] Login submission failed:", err);
        setError(
          "An unexpected error occurred. Please check your connection and try again."
        );
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData, loading, validateForm, router, searchParams, rememberMe]
  );

  // ✅ Handle 2FA submission
  const handleTwoFactorSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      if (!twoFactorCode.trim()) {
        setError("Please enter your authentication code");
        return;
      }

      setLoading(true);

      try {
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          twoFactorCode: twoFactorCode,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          setError("Invalid authentication code. Please try again.");
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] 2FA submission failed:", err);
        setError("Failed to verify code. Please try again.");
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData.email, formData.password, twoFactorCode, router, searchParams]
  );

  // ✅ Cleanup timeouts on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (submitTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(submitTimeoutRef.current);
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  // ✅ Auto-clear success message
  useEffect(() => {
    if (successMsg && !sessionExpired) {
      successTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setSuccessMsg(null);
      }, 5000);
    }

    return () => {
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, [successMsg, sessionExpired]);

  // ✅ 2FA Form UI
  if (twoFactorRequired) {
    return (
      <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 bg-white dark:bg-surface-800 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-surface-200 dark:border-surface-700">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
            <svg
              className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600"
              fill="none"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              stroke="currentColor"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M12 15v2m-6 4h12a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2

# Bug Detection & Fixes for `/src/app/login/page.tsx`

I've reviewed your login page and identified several critical security, UX, and functionality issues:

## Issues Found:

1. **No rate limiting** – Users can brute force passwords
2. **No CSRF protection** – Vulnerable to cross-site requests
3. **Hardcoded colors** – Should use design system (green instead of primary)
4. **No email verification flow** – Unclear email verification process
5. **No "Remember Me"** – Users must login every time
6. **No social login** – Missing OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, etc.)
7. **No account lockout** – After failed attempts, no protection
8. **Generic error messages** – Leaks information about accounts
9. **No password hints** – Doesn't guide users on password requirements
10. **No loading skeleton** – Page layout shifts during load
11. **No accessibility attributes** – Missing aria-live, roles
12. **Form not disabled on success** – Could submit twice
13. **No dark mode support** – Hardcoded light colors
14. **Email not normalized** – Could cause issues with case-sensitive DBs
15. **No error recovery** – Users stuck if login fails
16. **Success message timing** – Doesn't auto-clear
17. **No session timeout message** – Users don't know why they're logged out
18. **Search params not sanitized** – XSS vulnerability
19. **No redirect validation** – Could redirect to malicious URLs
20. **No two-factor authentication** – Weak security for sensitive accounts

  });

  const [successMsg, setSuccessMsg] = useState<string | null>(null);

    const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");

      setSuccessMsg(

      );

      );

I've reviewed your login page and identified several critical security, UX, and functionality issues:

## Issues Found:

1. **No rate limiting** – Users can brute force passwords
2. **No CSRF protection** – Vulnerable to cross-site requests

````typescript
// filepath: c:\Users\SIR AIM\Desktop\IYOSIOLA GROUP WEB APP\iyisola-foods\src\app\login\page.tsx

"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef, Suspense } from "react";
import { signIn } from "next-auth/react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";

// ✅ Validation schema
const LoginSchema = z.object({
  email: z
    .string()
    .email("Invalid email address")
    .max(100, "Email must be less than 100 characters")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase(),
  password: z
    .string()
    .min(1, "Password is required")
    .max(128, "Password is invalid"),
});

// ✅ Type definitions
interface LoginResponse {
  ok: boolean;
  error?: string;
  status: number;
}

interface FormData {
  email: string;
  password: string;
}

// ✅ Safe redirect validation
function isValidRedirect(redirect: string | null): boolean {
  if (!redirect) return false;

  // Only allow relative URLs starting with /
  if (!redirect.startsWith("/")) return false;

  // Prevent common open redirect patterns
  const dangerous = ["//", "http://", "https://", "javascript:", "data:"];
  if (dangerous.some((pattern) => redirect.includes(pattern))) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

// ✅ Loading skeleton
function LoginSkeleton() {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 animate-pulse">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="h-8 bg-surface-200 rounded w-3/4 mx-auto" />
        <div className="h-4 bg-surface-200 rounded w-1/2 mx-auto" />
      </div>
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
        <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
      </div>
      <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
    </div>
  );
}

// ✅ Login form component
function LoginForm() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();

  // ✅ State management
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<FormData>({
    email: "",
    password: "",
  });
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [successMsg, setSuccessMsg] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [rememberMe, setRememberMe] = useState(false);
  const [sessionExpired, setSessionExpired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorRequired, setTwoFactorRequired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorCode, setTwoFactorCode] = useState("");

  const submitTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();
  const successTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();

  // ✅ Check for session expiry or redirect params on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const sessionExpired = searchParams.get("session_expired");
    const registered = searchParams.get("registered");
    const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");

    if (sessionExpired === "true") {
      setSessionExpired(true);
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue."
      );
    }

    if (registered === "true") {
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Account created successfully! Please check your email to verify your account before logging in."
      );
    }

    // Validate redirect URL
    if (redirectUrl && !isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)) {
      console.warn("[SECURITY] Invalid redirect URL attempted:", redirectUrl);
    }
  }, [searchParams]);

  // ✅ Handle form input change
  const handleInputChange = useCallback(
    (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      const { name, value } = e.target;

      setFormData((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        [name]: value,
      }));

      // Clear field error on change
      if (errors[name]) {
        setErrors((prev) => {
          const newErrors = { ...prev };
          delete newErrors[name];
          return newErrors;
        });
      }

      // Clear general error
      if (error) {
        setError(null);
      }
    },
    [errors, error]
  );

  // ✅ Validate form
  const validateForm = useCallback((): boolean => {
    setErrors({});

    const validation = LoginSchema.safeParse(formData);

    if (!validation.success) {
      const fieldErrors: Record<string, string> = {};
      validation.error.errors.forEach((err) => {
        fieldErrors[err.path.join(".")] = err.message;
      });
      setErrors(fieldErrors);
      return false;
    }

    return true;
  }, [formData]);

  // ✅ Handle login submission
  const handleSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      // ✅ Prevent double submission
      if (loading || submitTimeoutRef.current) return;

      // ✅ Validate form
      if (!validateForm()) {
        return;
      }

      setError(null);
      setLoading(true);

      try {
        // ✅ Submit to NextAuth
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          rememberMe: rememberMe,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          // ✅ Handle specific error cases
          if (res.error === "EmailNotVerified") {
            setError(
              "Please verify your email address first. Check your inbox for the verification link."
            );
            // Option to resend verification email
          } else if (res.error === "AccountLocked") {
            setError(
              "Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes or reset your password."
            );
          } else if (res.error === "TwoFactorRequired") {
            setTwoFactorRequired(true);
            setTwoFactorCode("");
            return;
          } else if (res.error === "InvalidCredentials") {
            setError("Invalid email or password. Please try again.");
          } else {
            setError(
              "Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials and try again."
            );
          }
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        // ✅ Successful login
        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] Login submission failed:", err);
        setError(
          "An unexpected error occurred. Please check your connection and try again."
        );
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData, loading, validateForm, router, searchParams, rememberMe]
  );

  // ✅ Handle 2FA submission
  const handleTwoFactorSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      if (!twoFactorCode.trim()) {
        setError("Please enter your authentication code");
        return;
      }

      setLoading(true);

      try {
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          twoFactorCode: twoFactorCode,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          setError("Invalid authentication code. Please try again.");
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] 2FA submission failed:", err);
        setError("Failed to verify code. Please try again.");
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData.email, formData.password, twoFactorCode, router, searchParams]
  );

  // ✅ Cleanup timeouts on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (submitTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(submitTimeoutRef.current);
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  // ✅ Auto-clear success message
  useEffect(() => {
    if (successMsg && !sessionExpired) {
      successTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setSuccessMsg(null);
      }, 5000);
    }

    return () => {
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, [successMsg, sessionExpired]);

  // ✅ 2FA Form UI
  if (twoFactorRequired) {
    return (
      <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 bg-white dark:bg-surface-800 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-surface-200 dark:border-surface-700">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
            <svg
              className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600"
              fill="none"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              stroke="currentColor"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M12 15v2m-6 4h12a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2zm10-
```

```
# Bug Detection & Fixes for `/src/app/login/page.tsx`

I've reviewed your login page and identified several critical security, UX, and functionality issues:

## Issues Found:

1. **No rate limiting** – Users can brute force passwords
2. **No CSRF protection** – Vulnerable to cross-site requests
3. **Hardcoded colors** – Should use design system (green instead of primary)
4. **No email verification flow** – Unclear email verification process
5. **No "Remember Me"** – Users must login every time
6. **No social login** – Missing OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, etc.)
7. **No account lockout** – After failed attempts, no protection
8. **Generic error messages** – Leaks information about accounts
9. **No password hints** – Doesn't guide users on password requirements
10. **No loading skeleton** – Page layout shifts during load
11. **No accessibility attributes** – Missing aria-live, roles
12. **Form not disabled on success** – Could submit twice
13. **No dark mode support** – Hardcoded light colors
14. **Email not normalized** – Could cause issues with case-sensitive DBs
15. **No error recovery** – Users stuck if login fails
16. **Success message timing** – Doesn't auto-clear
17. **No session timeout message** – Users don't know why they're logged out
18. **Search params not sanitized** – XSS vulnerability
19. **No redirect validation** – Could redirect to malicious URLs
20. **No two-factor authentication** – Weak security for sensitive accounts

---

## Enhanced Fixed Version:

  if (!redirect) return false;

  if (!redirect.startsWith("/")) return false;

  // Prevent common open redirect patterns
  const dangerous = ["//", "http://", "https://", "javascript:", "data:"];
  if (dangerous.some((pattern) => redirect.includes(pattern))) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

// ✅ Loading skeleton

  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 animate-pulse">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="h-8 bg-surface-200 rounded w-3/4 mx-auto" />
        <div className="h-4 bg-surface-200 rounded w-1/2 mx-auto" />
      </div>
      <div className="space-y-4">

  );
}

// ✅ Login form component
function LoginForm() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();

  // ✅ State management

  const [twoFactorRequired, setTwoFactorRequired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorCode, setTwoFactorCode] = useState("");

  const submitTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();
  const successTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();

  // ✅ Check for session expiry or redirect params on mount

    const sessionExpired = searchParams.get("session_expired");
    const registered = searchParams.get("registered");
    const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");

    if (sessionExpired === "true") {
      setSessionExpired(true);
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue."
      );
    }

    if (registered === "true") {
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Account created successfully! Please check your email to verify your account before logging in."
      );
    }

    // Validate redirect URL
    if (redirectUrl && !isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)) {
      console.warn("[SECURITY] Invalid redirect URL attempted:", redirectUrl);
    }
  }, [searchParams]);

        });
      }

      }
    },
    [errors, error]
  );

  const validateForm = useCallback((): boolean => {
    setErrors({});

    const validation = LoginSchema.safeParse(formData);

    if (!validation.success) {
      const fieldErrors: Record<string, string> = {};
      validation.error.errors.forEach((err) => {
        fieldErrors[err.path.join(".")] = err.message;
      });
      setErrors(fieldErrors);
      return false;
    }

  }, [formData]);

# Bug Detection & Fixes for `/src/app/login/page.tsx`

I've reviewed your login page and identified several critical security, UX, and functionality issues:

## Issues Found:

1. **No rate limiting** – Users can brute force passwords
2. **No CSRF protection** – Vulnerable to cross-site requests
3. **Hardcoded colors** – Should use design system (green instead of primary)
4. **No email verification flow** – Unclear email verification process
5. **No "Remember Me"** – Users must login every time
6. **No social login** – Missing OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, etc.)
7. **No account lockout** – After failed attempts, no protection
8. **Generic error messages** – Leaks information about accounts
9. **No password hints** – Doesn't guide users on password requirements
10. **No loading skeleton** – Page layout shifts during load
11. **No accessibility attributes** – Missing aria-live, roles
12. **Form not disabled on success** – Could submit twice
13. **No dark mode support** – Hardcoded light colors
14. **Email not normalized** – Could cause issues with case-sensitive DBs
15. **No error recovery** – Users stuck if login fails
16. **Success message timing** – Doesn't auto-clear
17. **No session timeout message** – Users don't know why they're logged out
18. **Search params not sanitized** – XSS vulnerability
19. **No redirect validation** – Could redirect to malicious URLs
20. **No two-factor authentication** – Weak security for sensitive accounts

---

      if (loading || submitTimeoutRef.current) return;

      if (!validateForm()) {
        return;
      }

      setError(null);
      setLoading(true);

      try {
        // ✅ Submit to NextAuth
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          rememberMe: rememberMe,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          // ✅ Handle specific error cases
          if (res.error === "EmailNotVerified") {
            setError(
              "Please verify your email address first. Check your inbox for the verification link."
            );
            // Option to resend verification email
          } else if (res.error === "AccountLocked") {
            setError(
              "Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes or reset your password."
            );
          } else if (res.error === "TwoFactorRequired") {
            setTwoFactorRequired(true);
            setTwoFactorCode("");
            return;
          } else if (res.error === "InvalidCredentials") {
            setError("Invalid email or password. Please try again.");
          } else {
            setError(
              "Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials and try again."
            );
          }
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        // ✅ Successful login
        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] Login submission failed:", err);
        setError(
          "An unexpected error occurred. Please check your connection and try again."
        );
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData, loading, validateForm, router, searchParams, rememberMe]
  );

  // ✅ Handle 2FA submission
  const handleTwoFactorSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      if (!twoFactorCode.trim()) {
        setError("Please enter your authentication code");
        return;
      }

      setLoading(true);

      try {
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          twoFactorCode: twoFactorCode,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          setError("Invalid authentication code. Please try again.");
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] 2FA submission failed:", err);
        setError("Failed to verify code. Please try again.");
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData.email, formData.password, twoFactorCode, router, searchParams]
  );

  // ✅ Cleanup timeouts on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (submitTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(submitTimeoutRef.current);
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  // ✅ Auto-clear success message
  useEffect(() => {
    if (successMsg && !sessionExpired) {
      successTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setSuccessMsg(null);
      }, 5000);
    }

    return () => {
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, [successMsg, sessionExpired]);

  // ✅ 2FA Form UI
  if (twoFactorRequired) {
    return (
      <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 bg-white dark:bg-surface-800 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-surface-200 dark:border-surface-700">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
            <svg
              className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600"
              fill="none"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              stroke="currentColor"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M12 15v2m-6 4h12a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2

# Bug Detection & Fixes for `/src/app/login/page.tsx`

I've reviewed your login page and identified several critical security, UX, and functionality issues:

## Issues Found:

1. **No rate limiting** – Users can brute force passwords
2. **No CSRF protection** – Vulnerable to cross-site requests
3. **Hardcoded colors** – Should use design system (green instead of primary)
4. **No email verification flow** – Unclear email verification process
5. **No "Remember Me"** – Users must login every time
6. **No social login** – Missing OAuth providers (Google, GitHub, etc.)
7. **No account lockout** – After failed attempts, no protection
8. **Generic error messages** – Leaks information about accounts
9. **No password hints** – Doesn't guide users on password requirements
10. **No loading skeleton** – Page layout shifts during load
11. **No accessibility attributes** – Missing aria-live, roles
12. **Form not disabled on success** – Could submit twice
13. **No dark mode support** – Hardcoded light colors
14. **Email not normalized** – Could cause issues with case-sensitive DBs
15. **No error recovery** – Users stuck if login fails
16. **Success message timing** – Doesn't auto-clear
17. **No session timeout message** – Users don't know why they're logged out
18. **Search params not sanitized** – XSS vulnerability
19. **No redirect validation** – Could redirect to malicious URLs
20. **No two-factor authentication** – Weak security for sensitive accounts

---

## Enhanced Fixed Version:

````typescript
// filepath: c:\Users\SIR AIM\Desktop\IYOSIOLA GROUP WEB APP\iyisola-foods\src\app\login\page.tsx

"use client";

import { useState, useEffect, useCallback, useRef, Suspense } from "react";
import { signIn } from "next-auth/react";
import Link from "next/link";
import { useRouter, useSearchParams } from "next/navigation";
import { z } from "zod";

// ✅ Validation schema
const LoginSchema = z.object({
  email: z
    .string()
    .email("Invalid email address")
    .max(100, "Email must be less than 100 characters")
    .trim()
    .toLowerCase(),
  password: z
    .string()
    .min(1, "Password is required")
    .max(128, "Password is invalid"),
});

// ✅ Type definitions
interface LoginResponse {
  ok: boolean;
  error?: string;
  status: number;
}

interface FormData {
  email: string;
  password: string;
}

// ✅ Safe redirect validation
function isValidRedirect(redirect: string | null): boolean {
  if (!redirect) return false;

  // Only allow relative URLs starting with /
  if (!redirect.startsWith("/")) return false;

  // Prevent common open redirect patterns
  const dangerous = ["//", "http://", "https://", "javascript:", "data:"];
  if (dangerous.some((pattern) => redirect.includes(pattern))) {
    return false;
  }

  return true;
}

// ✅ Loading skeleton
function LoginSkeleton() {
  return (
    <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 animate-pulse">
      <div className="space-y-2">
        <div className="h-8 bg-surface-200 rounded w-3/4 mx-auto" />
        <div className="h-4 bg-surface-200 rounded w-1/2 mx-auto" />
      </div>
      <div className="space-y-4">
        <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
        <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
      </div>
      <div className="h-10 bg-surface-200 rounded" />
    </div>
  );
}

// ✅ Login form component
function LoginForm() {
  const router = useRouter();
  const searchParams = useSearchParams();

  // ✅ State management
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState<FormData>({
    email: "",
    password: "",
  });
  const [errors, setErrors] = useState<Record<string, string>>({});
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [successMsg, setSuccessMsg] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showPassword, setShowPassword] = useState(false);
  const [rememberMe, setRememberMe] = useState(false);
  const [sessionExpired, setSessionExpired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorRequired, setTwoFactorRequired] = useState(false);
  const [twoFactorCode, setTwoFactorCode] = useState("");

  const submitTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();
  const successTimeoutRef = useRef<NodeJS.Timeout>();

  // ✅ Check for session expiry or redirect params on mount
  useEffect(() => {
    const sessionExpired = searchParams.get("session_expired");
    const registered = searchParams.get("registered");
    const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");

    if (sessionExpired === "true") {
      setSessionExpired(true);
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Your session has expired. Please log in again to continue."
      );
    }

    if (registered === "true") {
      setSuccessMsg(
        "Account created successfully! Please check your email to verify your account before logging in."
      );
    }

    // Validate redirect URL
    if (redirectUrl && !isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)) {
      console.warn("[SECURITY] Invalid redirect URL attempted:", redirectUrl);
    }
  }, [searchParams]);

  // ✅ Handle form input change
  const handleInputChange = useCallback(
    (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
      const { name, value } = e.target;

      setFormData((prev) => ({
        ...prev,
        [name]: value,
      }));

      // Clear field error on change
      if (errors[name]) {
        setErrors((prev) => {
          const newErrors = { ...prev };
          delete newErrors[name];
          return newErrors;
        });
      }

      // Clear general error
      if (error) {
        setError(null);
      }
    },
    [errors, error]
  );

  // ✅ Validate form
  const validateForm = useCallback((): boolean => {
    setErrors({});

    const validation = LoginSchema.safeParse(formData);

    if (!validation.success) {
      const fieldErrors: Record<string, string> = {};
      validation.error.errors.forEach((err) => {
        fieldErrors[err.path.join(".")] = err.message;
      });
      setErrors(fieldErrors);
      return false;
    }

    return true;
  }, [formData]);

  // ✅ Handle login submission
  const handleSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      // ✅ Prevent double submission
      if (loading || submitTimeoutRef.current) return;

      // ✅ Validate form
      if (!validateForm()) {
        return;
      }

      setError(null);
      setLoading(true);

      try {
        // ✅ Submit to NextAuth
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          rememberMe: rememberMe,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          // ✅ Handle specific error cases
          if (res.error === "EmailNotVerified") {
            setError(
              "Please verify your email address first. Check your inbox for the verification link."
            );
            // Option to resend verification email
          } else if (res.error === "AccountLocked") {
            setError(
              "Your account has been temporarily locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes or reset your password."
            );
          } else if (res.error === "TwoFactorRequired") {
            setTwoFactorRequired(true);
            setTwoFactorCode("");
            return;
          } else if (res.error === "InvalidCredentials") {
            setError("Invalid email or password. Please try again.");
          } else {
            setError(
              "Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials and try again."
            );
          }
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        // ✅ Successful login
        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] Login submission failed:", err);
        setError(
          "An unexpected error occurred. Please check your connection and try again."
        );
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData, loading, validateForm, router, searchParams, rememberMe]
  );

  // ✅ Handle 2FA submission
  const handleTwoFactorSubmit = useCallback(
    async (e: React.FormEvent<HTMLFormElement>) => {
      e.preventDefault();

      if (!twoFactorCode.trim()) {
        setError("Please enter your authentication code");
        return;
      }

      setLoading(true);

      try {
        const res = (await signIn("credentials", {
          redirect: false,
          email: formData.email.trim().toLowerCase(),
          password: formData.password,
          twoFactorCode: twoFactorCode,
        })) as LoginResponse;

        if (!res.ok) {
          setError("Invalid authentication code. Please try again.");
          setLoading(false);
          return;
        }

        const redirectUrl = searchParams.get("redirect");
        const destination = isValidRedirect(redirectUrl)
          ? redirectUrl
          : "/dashboard";

        router.push(destination);
        router.refresh();
      } catch (err) {
        console.error("[ERROR] 2FA submission failed:", err);
        setError("Failed to verify code. Please try again.");
        setLoading(false);
      }
    },
    [formData.email, formData.password, twoFactorCode, router, searchParams]
  );

  // ✅ Cleanup timeouts on unmount
  useEffect(() => {
    return () => {
      if (submitTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(submitTimeoutRef.current);
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, []);

  // ✅ Auto-clear success message
  useEffect(() => {
    if (successMsg && !sessionExpired) {
      successTimeoutRef.current = setTimeout(() => {
        setSuccessMsg(null);
      }, 5000);
    }

    return () => {
      if (successTimeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(successTimeoutRef.current);
    };
  }, [successMsg, sessionExpired]);

  // ✅ 2FA Form UI
  if (twoFactorRequired) {
    return (
      <div className="w-full max-w-md space-y-6 bg-white dark:bg-surface-800 p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-surface-200 dark:border-surface-700">
        <div className="text-center">
          <div className="w-12 h-12 bg-primary-100 dark:bg-primary-900 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mx-auto mb-4">
            <svg
              className="w-6 h-6 text-primary-600"
              fill="none"
              viewBox="0 0 24 24"
              stroke="currentColor"
            >
              <path
                strokeLinecap="round"
                strokeLinejoin="round"
                strokeWidth={2}
                d="M12 15v2m-6 4h12a2 2 0 002-2v-6a2 2 0 00-2-2H6a2 2 0 00-2 2v6a2 2 0 002 2zm10-
